description: As the Scrum Master for the E-Commerce Platform project, document the Sprint 1 Retrospective meeting in OpenProject. Create a meeting titled 'Sprint 1 Retrospective - E-Commerce Platform' scheduled for 2025-02-10 at 14:00 with a 1.5-hour duration at 'Room 4B / https://meet.example.com/retro-sprint1'. The meeting should include four agenda items in order: 'Sprint 1 velocity and burndown review', 'What went well', 'What needs improvement', and 'Action items for Sprint 2'. Invite Alice Johnson, Bob Smith, and Carol Williams as participants. For the first agenda item, record the note: 'Sprint velocity was 34 story points against a target of 40. The Elasticsearch integration was completed ahead of schedule. Mobile Safari checkout bug took longer than estimated.' The browser is already open on the project's Meetings page and you are logged in as admin.
